name: Lori's New York Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
Crust: Mix the ingredients together and press into a 9-inch springform pan.
Filling: Beat the cream cheese with an electric mixer for 20 to 30 minutes until creamy and soft. Add 1 cup sugar gradually. Add the egg yolks one at a time to the mixture, then add the sour cream, lemon juice, and vanilla until smooth. In a separate bowl, beat the egg whites until soft and frothy but not firm. Gently fold the egg white mixture into the batter and pour the entire mixture into the prepared pan. Bake in an oven set to 325 degrees Fahrenheit for one hour. Turn off the oven and leave the cheesecake inside for another hour. Refrigerate for at least 6 hours or overnight.
